description: This Kotlin source file defines the LoginActivity class for an Android application, including UI initialization, input validation, and navigation to CalculatorActivity.

classes.name: LoginActivity
classes.description: An Android activity class that manages user login UI, validates input, and navigates to another activity upon successful login.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Overrides the Activity's onCreate method to set up the login UI, handle user input, validate credentials, and start CalculatorActivity.
